news:news.news:title: Iran-US talks have stalled, raising questions about future relations, while Ukraine and Russia continue to accuse each other of ceasefire violations.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran-US relations, Ukraine-Russia conflict, Haitian tourist tragedy, Asha Bhosle death, California governor race

news:news.news:title: US inflation rises sharply amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, while federal workers face job market challenges post-Trump cuts.
news:news.news:keywords: US inflation trends, job market challenges for federal workers, corporate social responsibility issues

news:news.news:title: The Netherlands becomes the first European country to approve Tesla's supervised Full Self-Driving technology, signaling potential wider adoption in the EU.
news:news.news:keywords: affordable refurbished gadgets, advancements in TV technology, history of iconic phones, AI coding competition, Tesla Full Self-Driving approval

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy's Masters lead evaporated, setting the stage for a dramatic final round, while Kelsey Plum and Sophie Cunningham re-signed with their WNBA teams.
news:news.news:keywords: Masters golf tournament updates, WNBA player re-signings, Tyson Fury boxing match recap, UFC 327 highlights, NBA playoff implications

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into human history, health, and the universe, including Neanderthal interactions and advancements in cancer treatment.
news:news.news:keywords: Neanderthal cooperation and human history, Health benefits of eating habits, Airborne toxins and environmental health, Advancements in cancer treatment, The mystery of the universe's expansion

news:news.news:title: Hungarians are voting on whether to end Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule amid ongoing tensions in Ukraine and rising political challenges in Europe.
news:news.news:keywords: Hungary elections 2026, Ukraine Easter truce, Germany far-right politics, California governor race, Iran satellite imagery restrictions

news:news.news:title: The Netherlands becomes the first European country to approve Tesla's supervised Full Self-Driving technology, potentially influencing wider EU adoption.
